parsed_output.justification: The conversation heavily centers around suspicions directed at Mike, with several participants noting his actions (including “Mike: Wolfie” remarks, comments that Mike probably stole from others, and accusations that Mike may still retain the werewolf role despite swapping). Several statements imply that Mike’s role was that of the copycat and that he may have become a werewolf after a swap. Consequently, voting for Mike aligns best with targeting a probable werewolf.
